title: Brilliant Vanilla
description: Ultra-optimized Fabric modpack with Sodium, Iris, and Voxy — massive FPS boosts, shader support, and vanilla-friendly enhancements.
body:
# **Brilliant Vanilla**
_A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on performance, smooth gameplay, and vanilla-friendly enhancements._

Brilliant Vanilla is designed to **dramatically boost Minecraft’s performance while keeping the game feeling as vanilla as possible.** Built on Fabric with powerful optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Iris, and Voxy, the pack delivers **higher FPS, smoother gameplay, and excellent shader support** without changing the core Minecraft experience.

### Performance First

Brilliant Vanilla significantly improves performance using modern optimization mods such as **Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast, and Entity Culling.** These improvements reduce lag, increase FPS, and make the game feel far smoother on nearly any system.

Advanced improvements like **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine** and **Voxy** help the game handle large worlds and higher render distances with ease.

### Shader Ready

Brilliant Vanilla is built to run shaders smoothly while maintaining high performance.

With **Iris Shaders** and Sodium’s powerful rendering improvements, you can enjoy beautiful visuals without sacrificing FPS. The pack includes carefully selected shaders like **Photon** and **Complementary Shaders**, enhanced with **Euphoria Patches** for an even better visual experience.

### Vanilla, Refined

The modpack includes **small quality-of-life improvements and subtle visual enhancements** that feel natural to the vanilla game. These additions improve the user interface, visuals, sounds, and general gameplay polish while keeping Minecraft’s original feel intact.

### Carefully Crafted

Brilliant Vanilla was built through **extensive testing and refinement** to find the perfect balance of performance, visuals, and vanilla gameplay.

Every included mod serves a purpose: **increase FPS, improve smoothness, fix vanilla issues, and add small improvements that make Minecraft feel better to play.**

### Built on Fabric

Brilliant Vanilla uses the **Fabric mod loader**, which is lightweight, fast, and highly compatible. Because the pack avoids major content mods, you can play on almost any server or world while enjoying the performance improvements.

## Recommended RAM & Performance Settings
- **RAM Allocation:** 4–8 GB recommended for smooth gameplay
- **Sodium Settings:** Set the Max Framerate slider to Unlimited in Minecraft’s video settings to unlock your full FPS potential

## Included Mods
Brilliant Vanilla includes a carefully selected collection of performance, rendering, and quality-of-life mods that improve Minecraft while keeping the gameplay vanilla.

### Performance & Optimization
- Sodium
- Lithium
- FerriteCore
- ModernFix-mVUS
- ImmediatelyFast
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- More Culling
- Chunky
- BadOptimizations
- Better Block Entities

### Graphics & Rendering
- Iris Shaders
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Voxy
- Continuity
- Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
- ScalableLux
- Visuality
- Subtle Effects
- Particle Core
- Particle Rain

### Gameplay & Quality of Life
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Zoomify
- Mouse Tweaks
- Smooth Scrolling
- Better Mount HUD
- AmbientSounds
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Presence Footsteps
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map
- 3D Skin Layers

### UI & Configuration
- Sodium Extra
- Mod Menu
- Cubes Without Borders
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Fzzy Config
- Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)

### Bug Fixes & Libraries
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlinv
- Cloth Config API
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
- Text Placeholder API
- Debugify
- MidnightLib
- CreativeCore

## Included Shaders
Brilliant Vanilla comes with a few selected shaders designed to provide **great visuals** while **maintaining strong performance.**
- Photon
- Complementary Shaders – Unbound
- Euphoria Patches

## Included Resource Packs
To enhance visual clarity while keeping the classic Minecraft aesthetic, the pack includes:
- Default Dark Mode
- Faithful 32x
- Bare Bones
